common.forbidden: You do not have permission to access this page.
common.comingSoon: This feature is not yet available.
common.scopeRequired: This page is available only for a single customer. Narrow the customer scope to one customer to continue.

auth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

deny.title: Access Denied
deny.accountInactive: Your account has been suspended or disabled. Please contact an administrator.
deny.noAccess: You do not have access to any customer workspace. Please request an invitation from a manager.
deny.genericError: An error occurred during sign-in. Please try again.
deny.adminMfaRequired: Multi-factor authentication is required for System Admin access. Please configure TOTP or WebAuthn.
deny.adminAuthTooOld: Your authentication has expired. System Admin sign-in must be completed within 5 minutes.
deny.adminRoleMissing: You do not have the System Admin role. Contact an administrator to request access.
deny.adminNotEligible: Your account is not eligible for System Admin access.
deny.invitationExpired: This invitation has expired or is no longer valid. Please request a new invitation.
deny.invitationEmailMismatch: The email address you signed in with does not match the invited email. Please sign in with the correct account.
deny.invitationEmailNotVerified: Your email address has not been verified. Please verify your email before accepting the invitation.
deny.bridgeExpired: The bridge connection has expired or was already used. Please initiate a new connection from AICE.
deny.bridgeCustomerMismatch: The customer scope sent from AICE does not match what is registered for this environment in Clumit Insight. This usually means the operator who registered the AICE environment used a different customer identifier than the one AICE is sending. Please report this configuration error to your operator with the time of the failure so they can reconcile the registration.
deny.bridgeCustomerInactive: Sign-in for this customer is currently disabled in Clumit Insight. The customer record exists but is not active. Please wait for the operator to reactivate the customer, then try again. If you need urgent access, contact your operator.
deny.bridgeEnvironmentInactive: Sign-in for this AICE environment is currently disabled in Clumit Insight. The environment is registered but not active. Please wait for the operator to reactivate the environment, then try again. If you need urgent access, contact your operator.
deny.bridgeNoAccess: You are signed in, but your account is not authorized for the customer that AICE asked you to access. If you should be a member of that customer, ask a Manager of that customer to invite you. If you should be assigned to that customer as an analyst, ask a System Administrator to add you to the analyst assignment. Until then, you cannot continue with this bridge sign-in.
deny.contactAdmin: If you believe this is an error, please contact your system administrator.

members.title: Members
members.description: Manage members and invitations for your organization.
members.name: Name
members.lastManagerTooltip: This member is the only Manager. Their role cannot be changed and they cannot be removed.
members.removeMemberConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove {name} from this organization? This action cannot be undone.
members.inviteDescription: Send an invitation email to add a new member.
members.inviteAlreadyMember: This email is already a member of the organization.
members.revokeConfirm: Are you sure you want to revoke the invitation for {email}?
members.actionError: An error occurred. Please try again.
members.lastManagerError: Cannot remove or demote the last Manager.

adminAccounts.description: Manage system accounts and their status.
adminAccounts.suspendConfirm: Are you sure you want to suspend {name}? All active sessions will be terminated immediately.

adminAccounts.actionError: Failed to update account status. Please try again.
adminAccounts.errorLoading: Failed to load accounts. Please try again.

adminAnalysts.title: Analysts
adminAnalysts.description: Designate analysts, manage customer assignments, and invite new analysts by email.
adminAnalysts.errorLoading: Failed to load analysts. Please try again.
adminAnalysts.actionError: An error occurred. Please try again.
adminAnalysts.customersUnavailable: Customer list could not be loaded (permission denied). Customer pickers are unavailable.
adminAnalysts.accountsUnavailable: Account list could not be loaded (permission denied). Direct designation search is unavailable.
adminAnalysts.customersLoadFailed: Customer list could not be loaded. Customer pickers are unavailable until it loads — reload the page to retry.
adminAnalysts.accountsLoadFailed: Account list could not be loaded. Direct designation search is unavailable until it loads — reload the page to retry.
adminAnalysts.inviteDescription: Send an email invitation to designate a new analyst. The recipient becomes an analyst once they accept.
adminAnalysts.inviteRefreshed: An existing pending invitation for this email was refreshed.
adminAnalysts.errorInvalidCustomers: Select at least one active customer.
adminAnalysts.errorAlreadyAssigned: This email is already assigned to all selected customers.
adminAnalysts.designateDescription: Designate an existing account as an analyst and assign customers. Only active accounts can be designated.
adminAnalysts.accountSearchPlaceholder: Search accounts by name or email
adminAnalysts.designateNoSelection: No account selected. Pick one from the list above.
adminAnalysts.revokeConfirm: Are you sure you want to revoke analyst eligibility from {name}?
adminAnalysts.revokeAssignmentsNote: Existing customer assignments are retained, not removed. Re-designating the analyst restores access to them.
adminAnalysts.pendingLoadFailed: Pending invitations could not be loaded. Reload the page to retry — invitations that need revoking may exist but are not shown here.
adminAnalysts.revokeInvitationConfirm: Are you sure you want to revoke the pending invitation for {email}?
adminAnalysts.errorAlreadyConsumed: This invitation has already been accepted.
adminAnalysts.manageDescription: Add or remove customer assignments for {name}.
adminAnalysts.noActiveCustomers: No active customers available to assign.
adminAnalysts.assignmentsLoadFailed: Current assignments could not be loaded. Reload or reopen this dialog to retry.
adminAnalysts.addAssignmentUnavailable: Adding assignments is unavailable until current assignments load. Reopen this dialog to retry.

adminCustomers.title: Customers
adminCustomers.description: Manage customers and their database provisioning status.
adminCustomers.name: Name
adminCustomers.createDescription: Create a new customer with a dedicated database.
adminCustomers.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? This will permanently remove the customer, its database, and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
adminCustomers.errorLoading: Failed to load customers. Please try again.
adminCustomers.actionError: An error occurred. Please try again.
adminCustomers.editDescription: Update the customer's name, external key, or description.
adminCustomers.externalKeyHelp: external_key must be a globally unique business identifier (e.g., domain, business registration number, contract code). The same value must be entered on aice-web-next under coordinated agreement via an out-of-band secure channel. Mismatches surface as bridge_customer_mismatch denials. Run a bridge test right after registration or change to verify the mapping.
adminCustomers.externalKeyChangeWarning: external_key is the customer mapping identifier shared with aice-web-next. After this change, the same value must be set on aice-web-next for the mapping to be preserved. Run a bridge test immediately to verify. Continue?
adminCustomers.errorExternalKeyConflict: Another customer already uses this external key.
adminCustomers.errorExternalKeyTooLong: external_key must be 256 characters or fewer.
adminCustomers.errorExternalKeyInvalidCharacters: external_key must not contain control characters.
adminCustomers.errorNameTooLong: Name must be 256 characters or fewer.
adminCustomers.errorNameInvalidCharacters: Name must not contain control characters.
adminCustomers.errorDescriptionTooLong: Description must be 1024 characters or fewer.
adminCustomers.errorDescriptionInvalidCharacters: Description must not contain control characters.

adminEnvironments.title: Environments
adminEnvironments.description: Manage AICE environments, customer mappings, and trust registry keys.
adminEnvironments.name: Name
adminEnvironments.createDescription: Register a new AICE environment. Optionally include a trust registry key.
adminEnvironments.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {name}? All customer mappings and trust registry keys will be permanently removed. This action cannot be undone.
adminEnvironments.errorLoading: Failed to load environments. Please try again.
adminEnvironments.actionError: An error occurred. Please try again.
adminEnvironments.linkCustomerDescription: Add a customer to this environment.
adminEnvironments.noLinkedCustomers: No customers linked to this environment.
adminEnvironments.registerKeyDescription: Register a new public key for this environment.
adminEnvironments.removeKeyConfirm: Remove key {kid} from issuer {issuer}? This action cannot be undone.
adminEnvironments.noKeys: No trust registry keys for this environment.
adminEnvironments.aiceIdConflict: An environment with this AICE ID already exists.
adminEnvironments.invalidPublicKey: Invalid JWK JSON. Please check the format.
adminEnvironments.thumbprintInstruction: Compare these values out-of-band against the thumbprint shown on aice-web-next. The base64url form is canonical; the hex form is provided as a visual aid.
adminEnvironments.thumbprintError: Failed to compute thumbprint. Please try again.
adminEnvironments.thumbprintConfirm: I confirmed the thumbprint matches the value shown on aice-web-next.
adminEnvironments.keyExpiresAtHelp: Leave blank for soft-expiry (governed by enabled only). Provide a timezone-explicit ISO 8601 datetime (Z or ±HH:MM) to enforce hard expiry.
adminEnvironments.keyExpiresAtInvalid: Expires At must be a timezone-explicit ISO 8601 datetime.

adminAdmins.description: Designate or revoke System Admin privileges. Maximum {max} admins allowed.

adminAdmins.revokeConfirm: Are you sure you want to revoke admin privileges from {name}? All admin sessions will be terminated immediately.
adminAdmins.actionError: An error occurred. Please try again.
adminAdmins.alreadyAdmin: This account is already an admin.
adminAdmins.errorLoading: Failed to load admins. Please try again.

validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address

adminAnalysisModel.title: Default analysis model (global)
adminAnalysisModel.description: The system-wide default analysis model. It applies to any customer without a per-customer override. When unset, the deployment fallback is used.
adminAnalysisModel.loadError: Failed to load the global default analysis model.
adminAnalysisModel.label: Model
adminAnalysisModel.currentEnv: No global default set; using the deployment fallback: {model}.
adminAnalysisModel.currentStale: The stored global default ({stored}) is no longer in the allowed model catalog and is being ignored — analyses are using the deployment fallback ({effective}). Choose a valid model below, or clear the global default.
adminAnalysisModel.saveGenericError: Failed to save the global default analysis model.
adminAnalysisModel.notInCatalog: That model is not in the allowed model catalog.

adminCustomerDefaultModel.title: Default analysis model (per customer)
adminCustomerDefaultModel.description: Set or clear a single customer's per-customer override. This applies to any customer, even when you are not assigned to it as an analyst. Clearing the override reverts the customer to the global default.
adminCustomerDefaultModel.customersLoadError: Failed to load the customer list.
adminCustomerDefaultModel.loadError: Failed to load this customer's default analysis model.
adminCustomerDefaultModel.label: Model
adminCustomerDefaultModel.saveGenericError: Failed to save the default analysis model.
adminCustomerDefaultModel.notInCatalog: That model is not in the allowed model catalog.
adminCustomerDefaultModel.reanalyzeOfferBody: The new default applies to future analyses only — existing results are unchanged. Re-analyzing this customer's existing data under the new model is a separate, cost-bounded action and is never run automatically.

customerSettings.rangesDescription: Public IP ranges registered here are redacted by the analysis engine when they appear in event payloads. Public IPs outside every registered range pass through unredacted; private IPs are always redacted.
customerSettings.rangesEmptyBanner: No public IP ranges registered. Public IPs are passed through (not redacted) by default; private IPs are always redacted.
customerSettings.rangeAddGenericError: Could not add the range. Please try again.
customerSettings.rangeDeleteError: Could not delete the range. Please try again.
customerSettings.rangeErrorInvalid: CIDR is not a syntactically valid IPv4 or IPv6 range.
customerSettings.rangeErrorPrivate: CIDR falls inside a private or reserved range (RFC 1918, IPv6 ULA, loopback, or link-local) and cannot be registered as a redaction range. Private ranges are always redacted by default.
customerSettings.rangeErrorDuplicate: CIDR is already registered for this customer.
customerSettings.rangeErrorOverlaps: CIDR overlaps with an existing registered range.
customerSettings.rangeErrorCapExceeded: This customer already has the maximum number of registered ranges.
customerSettings.applyExistingPreviewError: Could not load the preview. Please close this dialog and try again.
customerSettings.applyExistingJobQueued: Job queued ({status}). It will run in the background.
customerSettings.applyExistingTriggerGenericError: Could not start the re-redact job. Please try again.
customerSettings.retentionDescription: Set how long ingested events and analysis results are retained.
customerSettings.retentionTooShort: Retention must be at least 30 days.
customerSettings.retentionConfirmShortenFinite: Reducing the retention window will cause rows beyond the new window to be deleted on the next sweep. Continue?
customerSettings.retentionConfirmShortenUnlimited: Switching from unlimited to a finite window will cause analysis rows beyond the new window to be deleted on the next sweep. Continue?
customerSettings.defaultModelDescription: The model new analyses for this customer use by default. This is a standing default — separate from the one-off model an analyst can pick when regenerating a single report or story.
customerSettings.defaultModelLoadError: Failed to load the default analysis model.
customerSettings.defaultModelSaveGenericError: Failed to save the default analysis model.
customerSettings.defaultModelNotInCatalog: That model is not in the allowed model catalog.
customerSettings.defaultModelReanalyzeOfferBody: The new default applies to future analyses only — existing results are unchanged. Re-analyzing this customer's existing data under the new model is a separate, cost-bounded action and is never run automatically.

customerReanalyze.title: Re-analyze existing data
customerReanalyze.description: Re-run this customer's existing analyses under the new default model. This is a separate, cost-bounded action — it is never started automatically by changing the default.
customerReanalyze.guaranteeNote: Until you run a re-analysis here, the model change affects future analyses only — existing results are left untouched.
customerReanalyze.docsLink: Read how a model change affects existing data

adminCustomerReanalyze.title: Re-analyze existing data
adminCustomerReanalyze.description: Re-run this customer's existing analyses under the new default model. This is a separate, cost-bounded action — it is never started automatically by changing the default.
adminCustomerReanalyze.guaranteeNote: Until you run a re-analysis here, the model change affects future analyses only — existing results are left untouched.
adminCustomerReanalyze.docsLink: Read how a model change affects existing data

reanalyzeBackfill.title: Story-leaf re-analysis
reanalyzeBackfill.description: Re-queue existing story analyses under the new default model. Reports and event analyses are re-analyzed separately. Drained leaves do not cost anything to re-confirm.
reanalyzeBackfill.scopeHint: Defaults to the most recent 7 days. The per-run cap optionally limits how many leaves are queued at once; the worker drains the queue in throttled batches.
reanalyzeBackfill.capExcludedNote: {count} in-scope leaves were left out by the per-run cap. Run again to continue.
reanalyzeBackfill.confirmLabel: I understand this queues {count} story leaves for re-analysis under the new model.
reanalyzeBackfill.nothingToEnqueue: Nothing to re-analyze for this scope.
reanalyzeBackfill.enqueuedSummary: Seeded {seeded} new and re-queued {requeued} failed leaves.
reanalyzeBackfill.drainedYes: All {total} in-scope leaves are re-analyzed under the new model.
reanalyzeBackfill.drainedNo: {outstanding} of {total} in-scope leaves are still outstanding.
reanalyzeBackfill.drainFailedNote: {count} leaves failed and keep this scope outstanding. Re-run after resolving them so the report refresh is no longer blocked.

accountSettings.title: Account Settings
accountSettings.description: Set your preferred language and timezone. These preferences are saved to your account and apply across devices.
accountSettings.languageHelp: The language used across the app. Takes effect on your next navigation.
accountSettings.timezoneHelp: Your preferred timezone, saved to your account. It does not change how timestamps are displayed yet — the preference is stored for an upcoming release.

reports.fallbackNotice: The {language} report isn't available yet — showing the English version.
reports.jobPreparing: Preparing the {language} report… this page updates automatically when it's ready.
reports.jobFailed: Could not prepare the {language} report. Showing the English version for now.
reports.jobPendingSource: This report is still being generated. The {language} version will be available once the base report is ready.

common.evidencePinUnavailable: This evidence version is no longer available. The cited generation has been superseded or removed.

reportDetail.title: Security Report
reportDetail.subtitle: {period} • {when} • {tz} • generation {generation}
reportDetail.pendingBanner: The report is being generated (state: {status}). Refresh once the result is ready.
reportDetail.pinUnavailableBanner: This report version is no longer available. The cited generation has been superseded or removed.
reportDetail.aggregateHint: Aggregated by Clumit Insight from {storyCount, plural, one {# story} other {# stories}} and {eventCount, plural, one {# event} other {# events}} plus suspicious-event trends.
reportDetail.leafCoverageNote: Aggregate scores reflect {reportModel} of {total} cited leaves analyzed under this report's model; the narrative covers all cited leaves.

reportIndex.subtitle: Available report buckets for this customer. Open a bucket to read its report.
reportIndex.empty: No report buckets are available yet. Reports appear here once the analysis worker begins tracking them.

storyDetail.title: Story Analysis
storyDetail.subtitle: Story {storyId} • generation {generation}
storyDetail.pendingBanner: Analysis is in progress (state: {status}). The page refreshes automatically once the result is ready.
storyDetail.memberEventsDescription: The suspicious events correlated into this story, in order.
storyDetail.memberUnavailable: Event analysis not available at the default variant.

eventAnalysis.title: AI Analysis
eventAnalysis.subtitle: Event {eventKey} • {aiceId}
eventAnalysis.retentionBanner: Source event removed by retention; analysis result preserved.
eventAnalysis.partOfThreat: {count, plural, one {Part of threat story} other {Part of threat stories}}
eventAnalysis.rerunDistinction: Regenerate re-runs the AI analysis on this already-ingested event within aimer-web, holding redaction constant. Force re-run hands off to aice-web-next, which re-submits the event from its original source to bypass the cached result; the redaction is refreshed only when aice-web-next re-ingests that source event.

regenerate.queued: Regenerate queued (generation {generation}). Refresh the page once processing completes.
regenerate.reportBody: This issues a fresh LLM call across the period's analyzed stories, events, and suspicious-event trends, and supersedes the latest generation when the new result lands. The previous result row is preserved with a superseded_at stamp.
regenerate.storyBody: This issues a fresh LLM call against the canonical story members and overwrites the latest generation when the new result lands. The previous result row is preserved with a superseded_at stamp.
regenerate.eventBody: This re-runs the AI analysis on this already-ingested event, holding redaction constant, and supersedes the latest generation when the new result lands. The previous result row is preserved with a superseded_at stamp. To re-ingest the raw event from source instead, use Force re-run.

lists.eventsSubtitle: Analyzed detections for this customer, highest priority first.
lists.eventsEmpty: No suspicious events match the current filters.
lists.eventsForbidden: You do not have permission to view suspicious events for this customer (403). Ask a customer administrator to grant the analyses:read permission.
lists.storiesSubtitle: Pre-curated correlations of suspicious events, highest priority first.
lists.storiesEmpty: No threat stories match the current filters.
lists.storiesForbidden: You do not have permission to view threat stories for this customer (403). Ask a customer administrator to grant the analyses:read permission.

sources.heading: Sources
sources.description: Cited evidence this report was generated from, pinned to the generation it consumed. These are report-level sources, not per-sentence citations.
sources.provenance: {storyCount, plural, one {# story} other {# stories}} · {eventCount, plural, one {# event} other {# events}}

citedBy.heading: Cited by
citedBy.description: Periodic reports that cited this evidence, newest first. Each link opens the exact report generation that consumed it.

overview.subtitle: Highest-risk and most recent items across the customers in scope.
overview.partialFailure: Some customers could not be reached and are excluded from the counts and list below: <names>{customers}</names>. Try again shortly.
overview.storiesEmpty: No threat stories in scope yet.
overview.eventsEmpty: No suspicious events in scope yet.
overview.reportsEmptyFull: No reports are available across the customers in scope yet.
overview.storiesEmptyFull: No threat stories are available across the customers in scope yet.
overview.eventsEmptyFull: No analyzed events are available across the customers in scope yet.

customerHub.title: Customer
customerHub.subtitle: Reports and analysis for this customer.
customerHub.empty: You do not have access to any sections for this customer.
customerHub.forbidden: You do not have permission to view this customer (403).
customerHub.reportsDescription: Periodic report buckets for this customer.
customerHub.eventsDescription: Analyzed detections forwarded for this customer.

boundaries.reportsForbidden: You do not have permission to view reports for this customer (403). Ask a customer administrator to grant the reports:read permission.
boundaries.reportForbidden: You do not have permission to view this report (403). Ask a customer administrator to grant the reports:read permission.

compare.heading: Model comparison
compare.notGeneratedReport: No report has been generated with {model} for this period yet. Generate it to compare side by side.
compare.notGeneratedStory: No analysis has been generated with {model} for this story yet. Generate it to compare side by side.
compare.notGeneratedEvent: No analysis has been generated with {model} for this event yet. Generate it to compare side by side.
compare.leafCoverageNote: {model} is an alternate-model variant, so its story highlights and notable events show only leaves analyzed under {model}; until those leaves exist the sections stay empty by design. The default report fills these in from other models. The synthesis sections still compare normally.
